summary: Iteration 81 backend testing completed successfully. All 10 tests passed (100%). Fixed a bug in pdf_super_fascicolo.py where datetime object slicing was failing. Tested: 1) GET /api/commesse/{cid}/fascicolo-tecnico-completo returns PDF with correct Content-Type, 2) 404 for non-existent commessa, 3) 401/403 for unauthenticated requests, 4) PDF handles missing CAM data gracefully, 5) PDF size indicates multiple sections (~90-200KB), 6) Regression tests for company/settings (classe_esecuzione_default, certificato_en13241_numero) still pass.
test_credentials: Test users and data created/cleaned during pytest run
seed_data_creation: Test commesse with full data (materials, CAM lotti, welders, clients) created during tests, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 81 adds Super Fascicolo Tecnico Unico feature. Endpoint: GET /api/commesse/{commessa_id}/fascicolo-tecnico-completo returns a complete PDF containing Cover+Index, Cap 1-5 (Dati Generali, Riesame/ITT, Materiali/CAM/Green, Saldatura, Marcatura CE). Frontend has button data-testid='btn-super-fascicolo' in FascicoloTecnicoSection.js. Bug fixed: datetime objects from MongoDB now handled correctly with _safe_date() helper function.

super_fascicolo_returns_pdf.details: GET /api/commesse/{cid}/fascicolo-tecnico-completo returns PDF with Content-Type: application/pdf

super_fascicolo_401_unauthenticated.details: Returns 401/403 for requests without Authorization header

super_fascicolo_pdf_size.details: PDF size >50KB indicates multiple sections included

super_fascicolo_handles_missing_cam.details: PDF generates correctly even with no CAM lotti data (shows note instead of error)

super_fascicolo_filename.details: Content-Disposition header includes commessa numero in filename

company_settings_regression.details: GET/PUT /api/company/settings still returns/saves classe_esecuzione_default and certificato_en13241_numero

bug_fixed.issue: datetime.datetime object is not subscriptable - occurred when comm.get('created_at')[:10] was a datetime object from MongoDB
bug_fixed.fix: Added _safe_date() helper function to safely convert datetime/string to date string before slicing
